mainEntity.name: Are there different !Coconut plans for MTD users vs non‑MTD users?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. !Coconut offers different plans depending on whether you need full MTD functionality or basic accounting and banking features.

mainEntity.name: Can I downgrade or cancel if I don't need MTD features yet?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. You can change, downgrade, or cancel your plan in line with !Coconut's terms.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to pay extra for landlord functionality in !Coconut?

acceptedAnswer.text: Landlord functionality is included in relevant !Coconut plans, with pricing made clear before you subscribe.

mainEntity.name: How can I see what I'm paying for before upgrading to an MTD plan?

acceptedAnswer.text: All plan features and pricing are clearly shown in the !Coconut app and on the !Coconut website before you upgrade.
